demo_name: TE Connectivity Freight Booking Control Tower
use_case: Freight Booking Email Control Tower with Task-Based Exception Management

demo_setup.note: Provision the Planner plan and buckets before running the demo. Seed the 5 sample emails from the forwarder_emails section below.

forwarder_emails.subject: URGENT — Missing shipper address for BKG-2024-00341
forwarder_emails.body:
Dear team,

We are unable to proceed with booking BKG-2024-00341 for shipment TE-SHP-112233 departing Rotterdam next Tuesday.

We are MISSING the complete shipper address and contact details. This will cause a missed vessel cutoff with penalty demurrage charges if not resolved by 17:00 CET today.

Please provide the following immediately:
- Complete shipper company name
- Full street address
- Contact name and phone number
- VAT / EORI number

Best regards,
Kuehne+Nagel Dispatch Team

expected_planner_task.title: URGENT — Missing shipper address for BKG-2024-00341 — Kuehne+Nagel

forwarder_emails.subject: Commercial Invoice correction needed — BKG-2024-00298
forwarder_emails.body:
Hi,

The commercial invoice for booking BKG-2024-00298 has an incorrect HS code for the connector assemblies.

The customs broker has flagged this and will not clear the shipment (TE-SHP-109876) until the HS code is corrected from 8544.42.9000 to 8536.90.8500.

Please send the corrected commercial invoice document at your earliest convenience.

Regards,
DHL Freight Operations

expected_planner_task.title: Commercial Invoice correction needed — BKG-2024-00298 — DHL Freight

forwarder_emails.subject: Schedule change — please confirm BKG-2024-00355
forwarder_emails.body:
Dear TE Connectivity,

Please clarify and confirm the new departure arrangements for booking BKG-2024-00355 (shipment TE-SHP-113344).

The original vessel MSC AMBRA (V.24114) has been substituted with MSC ELISA (V.24115) with ETD now 14-Nov instead of the original 11-Nov departure.

Do you wish to:
a) Keep the booking on MSC ELISA with the new ETD of 14-Nov
b) Transfer the booking to the next available departure on 18-Nov
c) Cancel the booking

Please confirm your preference by 14:00 CET today.

Kind regards,
Panalpina Bookings Team

expected_planner_task.title: Schedule change — please confirm BKG-2024-00355 — Panalpina

forwarder_emails.subject: Packing list required for BKG-2024-00317
forwarder_emails.body:
Hello,

We require the packing list for shipment TE-SHP-110045, booking BKG-2024-00317.

This is needed before we can complete the export customs declaration. Without it, we cannot proceed and the shipment will miss the vessel loading window.

Please provide the packing list document as soon as possible.

Thank you,
Geodis Freight Team

expected_planner_task.title: Packing list required for BKG-2024-00317 — Geodis

forwarder_emails.subject: URGENT — Certificate of Origin missing — BKG-2024-00322 — HOLD
forwarder_emails.body:
URGENT ESCALATION

Shipment TE-SHP-110567 (booking BKG-2024-00322) is currently on HOLD at the port of Shanghai because the Certificate of Origin is missing from the documentation set.

A penalty fee of USD 250 per day will be applied for each day the shipment remains on hold.

This is a critical shipment for a key end customer with a delivery commitment.

Please expedite the Certificate of Origin IMMEDIATELY and send it to: customs-shanghai@db-schenker-demo.com

Time is critical.

DB Schenker Escalations Team

expected_planner_task.title: URGENT — Certificate of Origin missing — BKG-2024-00322 — DB Schenker

demo_scenarios.title: Shift Start Briefing — Team Leader Morning Check-In
demo_scenarios.description: Team Leader Sarah opens Teams and asks FreightBot for the daily exception briefing before the shift meeting.

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Good morning FreightBot, give me the shift briefing

conversation.speaker: FreightBot
conversation.message:
Good morning! Here's your Freight Exception Queue as of 07:30:

📋 **Exception Board Summary**
• **Total Open:** 5 exceptions
• 🔴 **High Priority:** 2 (TASK-001, TASK-005)
• ⏰ **Aged >24h:** 2 exceptions (TASK-001 is 26h, TASK-004 is 52h)
• ⚠️ **Aged >48h:** 1 exception (TASK-004 — OVERDUE)
• 🪣 Missing Info: 2 | Documentation: 2 | Clarification: 1

**Top 5 by Priority/Age:**
1. 🔴 TASK-004 — Packing list required BKG-2024-00317 (Geodis) — **52h OVERDUE**
2. 🔴 TASK-001 — URGENT Missing shipper address BKG-2024-00341 (Kuehne+Nagel) — 26h overdue
3. 🔴 TASK-005 — URGENT Certificate of Origin BKG-2024-00322 (DB Schenker) — 5h
4. 🟡 TASK-002 — Invoice correction BKG-2024-00298 (DHL Freight) — 18h
5. 🟡 TASK-003 — Schedule change BKG-2024-00355 (Panalpina) — 8h

Would you like me to look up a specific task or show all high-priority exceptions?

demo_talking_points: Zero inbox monitoring — exceptions surfaced automatically as Planner tasks
Instant aging visibility — team leader sees 2 overdue tasks before shift meeting
Priority ordering prevents critical items being buried
Works in Teams chat — no need to switch to Planner manually

demo_scenarios.title: Task Lookup by Booking ID
demo_scenarios.persona: Booking Agent — Looking up a specific shipment
demo_scenarios.description: Booking Agent Alex receives a call from DB Schenker about BKG-2024-00322 and quickly looks it up via FreightBot.

conversation.speaker: FreightBot
conversation.message:
I found **1 task** for booking BKG-2024-00322:

**TASK-005** 🔴 High Priority
📂 Bucket: Documentation
🚢 Shipment: TE-SHP-110567
🏢 Forwarder: DB Schenker
📅 Created: 5 hours ago | Due in: 19 hours

**Description:** Shipment ON HOLD at Shanghai port. Certificate of Origin missing. Daily penalty fees accruing. Critical customer shipment.

Would you like to mark this task as complete once resolved?

demo_talking_points: Natural language lookup — no need to know the task ID
Forwarder name and shipment ID parsed automatically from email
Context delivered instantly — agent knows the full situation before picking up the phone

demo_scenarios.title: Mark Task Complete
demo_scenarios.description: Booking Agent Alex resolves the Certificate of Origin for DB Schenker and marks the task complete.

conversation.speaker: FreightBot
conversation.message:
✅ **TASK-005 has been marked complete** in the Freight Booking Exceptions Planner.

**Task:** URGENT — Certificate of Origin missing — BKG-2024-00322 — DB Schenker
**Completed at:** Today at 14:22

Great work resolving this one! Is there anything else you need?

demo_talking_points: One-line task closure — no need to navigate to Planner manually
Audit trail maintained — completed_at timestamp recorded
Exception closed in 2 messages — streamlined resolution workflow

demo_scenarios.title: High Priority Exception Summary
demo_scenarios.description: Team Leader wants to see all high-priority exceptions before a forwarder call.

conversation.speaker: User
conversation.message: Show me all high priority exceptions

conversation.speaker: FreightBot
conversation.message:
Here are all **2 High Priority** open exceptions:

🔴 **TASK-001** — URGENT Missing shipper address — BKG-2024-00341
• Forwarder: Kuehne+Nagel | Bucket: Missing Info | **26h OVERDUE**
• Risk: Missed vessel cutoff + demurrage charges

🔴 **TASK-005** — URGENT Certificate of Origin — BKG-2024-00322
• Forwarder: DB Schenker | Bucket: Documentation | 5h
• Risk: Shipment ON HOLD at Shanghai, USD 250/day penalty

Both require immediate action. Would you like me to look up the details of either task?

demo_talking_points: Exception triage in seconds — filter directly to what matters most
Risk context included — agent explains WHY it's high priority
Team leader can immediately direct resources to the right issues

demo_scenarios.title: Email Auto-Triage (Agent Flow Demo)
demo_scenarios.persona: Demo presenter — showing the background automation
demo_scenarios.description: Show the Agent Flow triggering on a new email and creating the Planner task automatically.
agent_flow_steps: 1. New email arrives in admin@ mailbox from freight@geodis-demo.com
2. Agent Flow trigger fires (Office 365 — When a new email arrives)
3. CS Generative AI classifies: Medium priority, Missing Info bucket, BKG-2024-00317 parsed
4. Planner task created: 'Packing list required for BKG-2024-00317 — Geodis'
5. Due date set: +24 hours from email received
6. Task appears in FreightBot's shift briefing immediately
demo_talking_points: Zero human effort to classify and route the exception
Booking ID and shipment ID parsed automatically from email body
Priority set based on keywords — 'urgent' and 'penalty' keywords drive High priority
Team leader sees the task in the next shift briefing within seconds of email arrival

agent_flow_definition.name: Freight Exception Email to Planner Task

steps.description: Use CS Generative AI or keyword rules to classify email

steps.action: Condition — Is this a freight exception?
steps.description: Check if email contains freight-related keywords; skip if not applicable
Get the ID of the 'Freight Booking Exceptions' plan
Get the bucket ID for the classified bucket name

planner_task_mapping.note: Create this plan in Microsoft Planner before running the demo. Note the plan ID for the Agent Flow configuration.

credentials_note: All credentials, tenant IDs, and mailbox addresses must be configured via environment variables or the Agent Flow connection settings. Never hardcode credentials in flow definitions or agent code.
phase_2_roadmap: Automated email reply to forwarder acknowledging exception receipt
SAP TMS integration to validate booking IDs against live ERP data
Power BI dashboard for exception aging trends and forwarder performance
Teams adaptive card notifications for overdue exceptions
Multi-user task assignment (assign to specific booking agent)
SLA alerting when task approaches due date
